note: As-is baseline (before): managing/viewing work goes through the LLM in chat — /gogo:done and /gogo:view load skills, classify, render, convert and ask interactively (slow for read-only operations); state.md records only the current phase, with no timestamps or transition history for any external observer.

diagrams.title: Before: LLM in the hot path of read-only work; no pipeline telemetry
